MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Continued To Sep-10-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, For Production Of Documents, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant South Sac's motion to compel further responses to requests for production of documents (set #1) is granted. The objections, having been waived by the untimely response are stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to produce responsive documents within 10 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that plaintiff opposed the motion without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $615 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Consolidated Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, For Production Of Documents, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant South Sac's motion to compel further responses to requests for production of documents (set #2) is granted in part and denied in part. The objections are overruled and stricken. The motion is granted as to requests #25, 27, and 29. The motion is denied as to #26 as it is duplicative of #27. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Continued To Aug-20-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, For Production Of Documents, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-02-2007 Continued To Mar-27-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bryan M. Kreft for defendant and moving party: South Sac LLC.
Maureen A. Harrington for plaintiff and opposing party: Rainbow USA Incorporated

HEARING HELD and Defendant South Sac LLC's motion to compel further responses to requests for production of documents is continued to March 27, 2007 at 10:30 a.m. to join with other motion. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-02-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-15-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608
